lamb-chops-in-tomato-sauce.name: Lamb Chops In Tomato Sauce

ingredients.item: Finely chopped parsley leaves and thin stems
. aleppo pepper flakes or substitute 1/4 tsp. red pepper flakes
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: halved lengthwise and thinly sliced crosswise into half moons

instructions: In a large bowl, stir 2 tbsp. of the oil with the finely chopped parsley, garlic, lemon zest, Aleppo pepper, turmeric, and cinnamon. Season lamb chops with salt and pepper, and rub marinade all over chops. Let sit 15 minutes at room temperature.
Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine the shallots and 1 tbsp. of the red wine vinegar. Let shallots marinate at least 10 minutes and up to 30 minutes.

In a large high-sided skillet, heat two tbsp. of the oil over medium-high and add the lamb chops in a single layer. Cook, turning halfway through, until the lamb is golden on both sides and medium-rare, about 2 to 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a plate. Drain fat from skillet and wipe skillet clean.
Add the tomato sauce to the skillet and return to medium heat. Bring the tomato sauce to a simmer, stirring a few times, then remove from the heat and keep warm.
Toss the cucumbers and remaining roughly chopped parsley into the shallot mixture and stir in the remaining 2 tbsp. of oil. Season with salt.
Stir the yogurt with the remaining 2 tsp. of red wine vinegar. Season with salt.

Dollop yogurt and warm tomato sauce on bottom of 4 plates. Top with cucumber salad and lamb. Drizzle any extra dressing in cucumber salad bowl over lamb and sprinkle with more Aleppo. Serve immediately.

lamb-noodles-with-crunchy-vegetables-and.name: Lamb Noodles With Crunchy Vegetables And Cilantro

ingredients.prep: peeled, cut into very thin matchsticks
peeled, cut into very thin matchsticks

ingredients.item: Wheat noodles can be found at most asian markets. look for ones that are about  0.5 inch wide (they should resemble tagliatelle).

instructions: Blanch cilantro and mint in a medium pot of boiling water until wilted, about 20 seconds. Drain herbs and transfer to a bowl of ice water. Swish around to stop cooking; drain. Squeeze excess water from herbs.
Purée cilantro, mint, and simple syrup in a blender until smooth. Transfer to a small bowl; set aside.
Whisk cornstarch, 1 Tbsp. oil, and 1 Tbsp. water in a large bowl. Add lamb, breaking apart with your hands, and toss to coat. Let sit at room temperature 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, soak mushrooms in 3 cups hot water in a small bowl until mushrooms are soft and water is cool, 20–25 minutes. Remove mushrooms and finely chop. Reserve soaking liquid.

Heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a medium saucepan over medium-high. Cook lamb, stirring occasionally, until browned, about 5 minutes. Meat will release a lot of moisture and fat while it’s cooking; pour out all but about 2 Tbsp. fat. Then add scallions, garlic, ginger, and rehydrated mushrooms and cook, stirring often, until slightly softened and fragrant, about 2 minutes.

Add wine and simmer until almost completely evaporated, about 1 minute. Mix in sweet bean sauce, ground bean sauce, and soy sauce; lamb mixture should be coated. Add reserved mushroom soaking liquid and bring to a simmer. Reduce heat to a bare simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, until liquid is thickened and velvety in consistency, 75–90 minutes.
Toss cucumbers, carrot, chili oil, lime juice, and a pinch of salt in a small bowl to combine; set aside.

Cook noodles in a large pot of boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender but still chewy, about 3 minutes. Drain and transfer to a large bowl. Immediately add soy sauce, sesame oil, and 2 Tbsp. reserved herb syrup and stir with chopsticks or tongs to loosen noodles and coat. Add lamb sauce and toss to coat.
Divide noodles among bowls; top with reserved cucumber mixture and cilantro.

lamb-ribs-with-rhubarb-and-radish-salad.name: Lamb Ribs With Rhubarb And Radish Salad

ingredients.item: Rack of denver lamb ribs (about 2 pounds)
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Preheat oven to 300°. Toast black and white peppercorns and coriander and fennel seeds in a dry medium skillet over medium heat, shaking pan occasionally, until fragrant and seeds are golden, about 3 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely grind in a spice mill.

Generously season lamb with salt, then rub with spice mixture, pressing to adhere. Place bone side down on a wire rack set inside a rimmed baking sheet. Roast until ribs are browned and very tender and most of the fat has rendered, about 3 ½ hours (if ribs still look very fatty, roast 30 minutes more, tenting with foil if they look like they are in danger of burning).

While ribs are cooking, bring rhubarb, maple syrup, vinegar, and ½ cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until liquid is reduced by half and syrupy, about 20 minutes. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a heatproof measuring cup, pressing on solids to extract as much liquid as possible; discard solids.

Remove ribs from oven and increase temperature to 450°. Carefully lift ribs onto a platter and remove rack from baking sheet. Pour off rendered fat and juices from baking sheet; discard. Set ribs on baking sheet and cut between bones with a paring knife or kitchen shears to separate. Drizzle some rhubarb glaze over ribs, taking care not to dislodge spices.
Return ribs to oven and roast, frequently spooning rhubarb glaze over ribs, until sticky and glossy, 15–20 minutes.
Whisk lemon zest, lemon juice, honey, and mustard in a large bowl to blend. Whisking constantly, gradually add oil and whisk until emulsified. Season with salt and pepper.
Add radishes, rhubarb, shallot, and mint to bowl and toss to coat. Taste and season with salt and pepper.
Serve ribs drizzled with any remaining rhubarb glaze with radish-rhubarb salad alongside.
Do Ahead: Ribs can be roasted (but not glazed) 3 days ahead. Let cool; cover and chill.

lasooni-prawns-with-cilantro.name: Lasooni Prawns With Cilantro

ingredients.item: -on tiger prawns or deveined peeled extra-jumbo shrimp
Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: store-bought fried garlic (optional), and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: If using 16 head-on tiger prawns, working 1 prawn at a time, snip off antennae and legs with kitchen shears, then cut through shells along length of backs just deep enough into flesh to expose veins; remove veins and discard. Run a paring knife along backs of prawns, cutting most of the way through, and open up flesh like a book.

Mix grated 3 garlic cloves, finely grated, one 2" piece ginger, peeled, finely grated, and 1 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice in a medium bowl; season with kosher salt. Add prawns (or 16 deveined peeled extra-jumbo shrimp) and toss gently to coat. Cover and chill at least 20 minutes and up to 4 hours.

Mix 1 cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, 2 Tbsp. cream cheese, room temperature, 2 tsp. Kashmiri chile powder or paprika, 1 tsp. ajwain seeds or caraway seeds, 1 tsp. garam masala, 1 tsp. ground turmeric, 5 garlic cloves, finely chopped, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, and remaining 4 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice in another medium bowl to combine.
Remove prawns from lemon juice marinade; discard. Transfer to yogurt marinade; toss to coat. Cover and chill at least 30 minutes and up to 2 hours.

Prepare a grill for medium heat; oil grate. Arrange prawns, butterflied side up, on grate and grill, undisturbed, basting often with melted unsalted butter, until flesh is opaque throughout and shells are bright orange, about 5 minutes. (For shrimp, thread onto skewers and grill, turning once and basting often on both sides, until opaque, about 5 minutes.)
Divide prawns among plates or transfer to a platter; top with cilantro leaves and store-bought fried garlic (if using). Serve with lime wedges for squeezing over.

latkes-with-ancho-chile-salt-and-watercr.name: Latkes With Ancho-chile Salt And Watercress Guacamole
instructions: Toast chiles in small skillet over medium heat until darker and aromatic, 1 to 2 minutes per side. Cut in half with scissors. Stem, seed, and tear chiles; grind finely with 1/2 teaspoon coarse salt in spice mill.

Drape smooth kitchen towel over large bowl. Blend potatoes and 1 cup onions in processor until potatoes are very finely ground, scraping down bowl often. Scrape mixture into towel. Gather towel around tightly and squeeze out at least 1 cup liquid.

Scrape dry potato mixture from towel into another large bowl. Add cilantro, egg, masa, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, 1 1/4 teaspoons coarse salt, and 1 cup onions. Stir until mixture becomes moist and sticks together.

Heat 6 tablespoons oil in large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. For each latke, drop 1 rounded tablespoonful potato mixture into skillet; flatten to 2 1/2-inch round. Fry latkes until golden brown, adding oil as needed, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to rimmed baking sheet. DO AHEAD Can be made 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Rewarm in 204°C oven until crisp, about 5 minutes per side.
Arrange 3 latkes on each plate; sprinkle with chile salt. Spoon Watercress Guacamole into center. Garnish with watercress sprigs.

learn-how-to-make-cheese-pupusas-comeder.name: Learn How To Make Cheese Pupusas
learn-how-to-make-cheese-pupusas-comeder.original_name: Aprende cómo hacer pupusas de queso

ingredients.item: 1 ½ cup of tibia water or more if necessary

instructions: In a bowl, mix water, salt and flour into a mass.
Take a lump of dough into your hand, and then clamp with your hand to make a thick omelette.
Pon un poco del queso en el centro y luego rodea el relleno con la masa, para volver a formar una bola.
Reaping the ball to get a slightly thick omelette (about ¼ cm thick). Repeat this process to end with mass.
Fold some oil or butter with your fingers onto both sides of your pipusa and place them in the frying pan.
Warm up an anti-stick frying pan with medium-high heat.
Unite vegetable oil into the pits and place them onto the frying pan.
Cooking for about two minutes on each side or till both sides are golden.
Repite el proceso con el resto de la masa y el relleno.

lemon-cheesecake-squares-with-fresh-berr.name: Lemon Cheesecake Squares With Fresh Berries
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C. Fold 16-inch-long piece of foil to 8x16-inch strip; place in 8x8x2-inch metal baking pan, leaving overhang on 2 sides. Repeat with another sheet of foil in opposite direction, lining pan completely. Butter foil.

Place graham crackers in heavy-duty plastic bag. Using rolling pin or mallet, crush crackers finely. Melt butter in medium skillet over low heat. Remove from heat; add crumbs and toss to coat. Press crumbs evenly onto bottom of prepared pan. Bake crust until deep golden, about 12 minutes. Cool crust while preparing filling.
Using electric mixer, beat cream cheese and sugar in large bowl until smooth. Beat in egg and sour cream, then lemon juice, lemon peel, and vanilla. Spread batter over crust.

Bake cheesecake until slightly puffed and set in center, about 30 minutes; cool completely in pan on rack. Chill cheesecake until cold, at least 2 hours. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; keep chilled.
Using foil overhang as aid, lift cheesecake from pan. Cut into 16 squares; arrange on platter. Top each square with berries. Chill until ready to serve, up to 3 hours. Serve chilled.

lemon-crackle-cookies-pequerecetas.name: Lemon Crackle Cookies

ingredients.item: Robot de cocina o batidora de varillas

instructions: We mix the flour, the chemical yeast and the salt into a bowl and save. In another bowl we beat at medium velocity - high butter at room temperature with sugar for 3-4 minutes, until it remains creamy and sparkling. We added the egg, juice and lemon and vanilla extract and we mixed well. We add the dry ingredients reserved for moist. We have been at medium speed briefly, just to get the ingredients integrated.
Cubrimos bien la masa y la refrigeramos durante al menos 2 horas.

After time we get the dough out of the refrigerator and preheat the oven at 180 been 3 been (heat up and down). We cut up two trays with baking paper and put them up. With an ice cream spoon or two dessert spoons, we have portions of mass about 20 g. We form balls with our hands. We bounce every ball first into granulated sugar and then generously into glass sugar.
We put the dough balls onto the trays, leaving 2-3 cm of separation between them. We baked for 11-12 minutes at 180-3-3.
We let the lemon cookies stand on the plate for 5 minutes. We moved them to a cold grid. We repeat the baking process with the second plate.

instructions: Prepare this cream milk and light a pot with milk, lemon zest and cinnamon sticks and let it boil. In a bowl, mix the sugar with the flour, then add the yolks and beat well.

Remove from the fire, reject the cinnamon sticks, divide them into bowls and let them cool. When serving, sprinkle with powdered sugar and decorate to taste, for example with lemon slices, as you see in the photo.

lemon-poppyseed-dressing.name: Lemon Poppyseed Dressing
instructions: Blend sugar, lemon juice, onion, Dijon mustard, and salt in a blender until smooth. Stream canola oil in a thin stream into the mixture while blender is running. Add poppy seeds and pulse blender a few times, just to mix seeds into the dressing.

lemon-tahini-dressing-recipe-comedera.name: Lemon Tahini Dressing Recipe
lemon-tahini-dressing-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de aderezo de tahini y limón

ingredients.item: A cup of vinegar of rice

instructions: Take both lemons, cut them and squeal them well till you have the juice. Remove the seeds or particles from the shell that can be bitter.
Toma el diente de ajo, pela y filetea muy bien.
In a mixer, add the two tablespoons of tahi, the vinegar of rice, the ajonjolí oil, the lemon juice, the cayenne, the maple honey, the ginger and the garlic tooth.
Mix well till everything's well integrated and your dressing's uniform and homogenous.
Coloca el aderezo en una taza o recipiente, lleva a la nevera por 30 minutos para que se refrigere un poco antes de usar.
Enjoy salads, croquetes or some steak.

lemon-poppy-seed-fruit-dip.name: Lemon-poppy Seed Fruit Dip
instructions: Combine sour cream, lemonade concentrate, poppy seeds, and salt in a bowl; mix to combine. Garnish with lemon slice.

lets-make-some-crispy-chicken-fingers-co.name: Let's Make Some Crispy Chicken Fingers
lets-make-some-crispy-chicken-fingers-co.original_name: Hagámos unos crocantes dedos de pollo

ingredients.item: 1 cda of ground pimenton or paprika

instructions: We'll start by taking chicken breasts and cut them into small pieces or fingers.
We'll place our chicken fingers into a bowl to add salt, pepper, paprika and powder garlic.
Con una cuchara los mezclaremos todo, lo taparemos con  papel film y lo llevaremos a la nevera por 1 hora para que marine.
Vamos a batir los huevos muy bien para iniciar con nuestro rebozado.
Colocaremos la harina en un plato y el pan rallado en otro.
Once the chicken's finished marinating, we'll have to fry it.
We'll heat up a frying pan with enough oil to fry.
Pasaremos los dedos de pollo por la harina de trigo, posteriormente por el huevo y finalmente por el pan rallado para conseguir un rebozado perfecto.
We'll fry each of our fingers till our bouncing cape's super golden and chicken meat's juicy. They really cook in a few minutes.
When you put your chicken fingers out, you'll put them on absorbing paper to remove excess oil and they'll be more than ready to eat them.

lettuce-and-arugula-salad-with-prawns-an.name: Lettuce And Arugula Salad With Prawns And Avocado
lettuce-and-arugula-salad-with-prawns-an.original_name: Ensalada de canónigos y rúcula con langostinos y aguacate

ingredients.item: 2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: If the locusts aren't cooked, we'll cook them for a few minutes and fight them.
We washed well the ruula, the canons and the cherry tomatoes. We cut the tomatoes in half.
Cortamos la cebolla en juliana fina y reservamos.
We peel the avocado and cut it onto thin sheets or dice as you wish.
In a big bowl we mix the ruula and the canons, we add avocado, tomatoes, onion and locusts.
Fairy with oil, get out to taste and, if we wish, have some lemon juice or soft vinegar
We end up with some sesame seeds above and serve at the moment.

little-pot-rice-noodles.name: Little Pot Rice Noodles

ingredients.item: . shaoxing wine (chinese rice wine) or medium-dry sherry
. rice stick or pad thai noodles
. diamond crystal or 1 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: dark green parts only, finely chopped

instructions: Place 2½ lb. pork bones in a medium pot and pour in water to cover. Bring to a boil and cook 2 minutes. Drain bones in a colander set in sink and rinse under running water to remove impurities.

Combine pork bones, 1 large shallot, peeled, halved, 2 scallions, knotted together, 5 dried shiitake mushrooms, one 1" piece ginger, scrubbed, sliced ¼" thick, 2 whole star anise, and 5 white peppercorns in a medium pot. Pour in 10 cups water and bring to a boil. Reduce heat, partially cover pot with a lid, and simmer gently until broth is very flavorful, 2–3 hours.

Strain broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a large pot; discard solids.
Do ahead: Broth can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool, then cover and chill, or freeze for up to 3 months

Mix 8 oz. ground pork, 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. Shaoxing wine (Chinese rice wine) or medium-dry sherry, ¼ tsp. ground Sichuan peppercorns, and ¼ tsp. freshly ground white pepper in a medium bowl to combine. Cover and chill 30 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook 1 lb. rice stick or pad thai noodles according to package directions (they should be springy and chewy, but not as chewy as pasta). Drain, rinse with cold water, and set aside.

Heat 2 Tbsp. vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium. Cook pork mixture, stirring constantly, until starting to brown, about 1 minute. Stir in 3 garlic cloves, finely chopped, one 1" piece ginger, peeled, finely chopped, and 1 Tbsp. coarsely chopped pixian doubanjiang (spicy fermented broad bean paste) and cook, stirring constantly, until pork is browned and a little bit crispy, about 4 minutes. Taste and add more doubanjiang if needed. Remove from heat.

Return broth to a brisk simmer. Add 8 small bok choy (about 1 lb.), trimmed, halved, quartered if large, and ¾ cup trimmed chopped garlic chives (from 25–30) and cook until bok choy are tender, about 30 seconds. Stir in 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt and remove from heat. Taste and season with more salt if needed.

Divide reserved noodles among 4 bowls. Ladle broth and vegetables over. Top each bowl with 3 Tbsp. ground pork mixture, 3 Tbsp. zha cai (pickled mustard stems; from one 3.5-oz. bag), 1 Tbsp. soy sauce, 1 Tbsp. black (Chinkiang) vinegar, and 1 Tbsp. chili crisp. Scatters 3 scallions, dark green parts only, finely chopped, and a handful of cilantro leaves with tender stems on top, dividing evenly.

loaded-grill-cheese-kickin-mac-attack.name: Loaded Grill Cheese: Kickin’ Mac Attack
instructions: Spread mayo on one side of each slice of bread.
Add the slice of cheddar cheese to one slice of bread.
Add even layer of mac ‘n’ cheese on top of cheese.
Add tomato on top of mac n’ cheese.
Add jalapeños on top of tomato.
On low heat, add sandwich to a pan and grill mayo side down.
Grill for 3–5 minutes or until cheese melts and bread browns.
Enjoy!

lobster-colorado.name: Lobster Colorado
instructions: Set oven to Broil at 260°C (260 degrees C).

Sprinkle tenderloins all over with salt, pepper, and garlic powder. Wrap each filet with bacon, and secure with a toothpick. Place on a broiling pan, and broil to desired doneness, about 8 to 10 minutes per side for medium rare.

While tenderloins are cooking, melt 1/4 cup of butter over medium heat with 1/2 teaspoon Old Bay® seasoning. Stir in chopped lobster meat, and cook until done. Spoon lobster meat over cooked tenderloins, and return them to the broiler until the lobster meat begins to brown.

While the lobster is in the oven, heat the remaining 1/4 cup of butter in a small saucepan over medium-high heat, cook until it browns, turning the color of a hazelnut. To serve, spoon the browned butter over the steaks, and sprinkle with the remaining Old Bay® seasoning.
